summary: Attempted to test FA CHAI and JDB provider additions but encountered frontend loading issues. Backend API is functional, but frontend appears stuck on loading screen preventing full testing of new providers.

ui_bugs.issue: Frontend stuck on loading screen showing 'Sinal Carregando...' and 'Conectando ao servidor...' - app does not progress past initial loading state

integration_issues.issue: Frontend appears unable to complete connection to backend despite backend API being functional

passed_tests: Backend API health check at /api/ returns 'Hello World'
Backend server running successfully on port 8001
CORS configuration appears functional based on API responses
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Frontend is stuck on loading screen and cannot progress to main application. Need to investigate JavaScript errors, API connection issues, or loading logic problems. Cannot test FA CHAI and JDB providers until frontend loading issue is resolved.
